heading: Today
text: Scattered snow showers, mixing with rain in the valleys.

heading: Tonight
text: Scattered evening snow showers north, mainly over high terrain.
temperature: Lows in the teens north, low to mid 20s south

heading: Sunday
text: Chance of afternoon snow in far northern NY and northern Greens.

heading: Monday
text: Patchy freezing rain possible early in the east, otherwise scattered showers.
